summary: Iteration 191: BrandLogo SVG system and UI polish testing. All features pass. The new Connected Triad SVG logo renders correctly across all pages (navbar, login, register, footer, sidebars, logo preview). Products page loads without crashing (toLocaleString fix verified). Auth flows work for both customer and admin. Mobile navbar displays logo correctly.
test_credentials: Customer: demo.customer@konekt.com / Demo123!, Admin: admin@konekt.co.tz / KnktcKk_L-hw1wSyquvd!
context_for_next_testing_agent: BrandLogo SVG system fully verified. Connected Triad logo (1 gold node, 2 dark blue nodes) renders correctly in all variants (dark/light) and types (full/secondary/icon). Products page toLocaleString fix working.

brand_logo_svg_navbar.description: BrandLogo SVG renders in navbar with secondary type (icon + Konekt, no tagline)
brand_logo_svg_navbar.evidence: data-testid='brand-logo' found with SVG icon, text shows 'Konekt' only (no tagline)

brand_logo_svg_login_page.description: Login page displays full logo with tagline on dark branding panel
brand_logo_svg_login_page.evidence: BrandLogo with type='full' shows 'Business Procurement Simplified' tagline

brand_logo_svg_register_page.description: Register page displays full logo with tagline on dark branding panel
brand_logo_svg_register_page.evidence: BrandLogo with type='full' renders correctly, PhoneNumberField present

brand_logo_svg_footer.description: Footer renders BrandLogo with light variant on dark background
brand_logo_svg_footer.evidence: data-testid='footer' contains BrandLogo with SVG icon, light variant colors

brand_logo_svg_staff_login.description: StaffLoginPage uses BrandLogo with type='full' for branding panel
brand_logo_svg_staff_login.evidence: Code review confirms BrandLogo import and type='full' usage at line 46

brand_logo_svg_logo_preview.description: Logo preview page (/logo-preview) renders all sections with multiple BrandLogo instances
brand_logo_svg_logo_preview.evidence: Found 13 BrandLogo instances, page title 'Konekt Logo — Refined Connected Triad'

products_page_tolocalestring_fix.description: Products page (/products) loads without crashing after toLocaleString fix
products_page_tolocalestring_fix.evidence: data-testid='products-page' found, 17 product cards rendered with TZS prices

marketplace_product_cards.description: Marketplace product cards render with correct data and prices
marketplace_product_cards.evidence: Marketplace page shows products with TZS prices, Add to Cart buttons visible

mobile_navbar_logo.description: Mobile navbar shows logo correctly at smaller size
mobile_navbar_logo.evidence: BrandLogo with SVG icon found on mobile viewport (390x844)

navbar_backdrop_blur.evidence: Code review confirms bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md in Navbar.js and PublicNavbarV2.jsx

pdp_cta_hover_brightness.description: PDP CTA buttons have hover:brightness-110 effect
pdp_cta_hover_brightness.evidence: Code review confirms hover:brightness-110 on Add to Cart buttons in MarketplaceListingDetailContent.jsx

global_micro_interactions.description: Global micro-interactions CSS added to index.css
global_micro_interactions.evidence: index.css contains focus rings, btn-gold-cta hover brightness, fade-up animation

logo_system_audit.svg_structure: Connected Triad: 1 gold node (#D4A843), 2 dark blue nodes (#20364D), asymmetric triangle, thick connectors
